markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content progress, site performance, and future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Comparison Page Fix:** The table-move fix is approved for the top 5 non-"Strapi vs." comparison pages before EOY; the agency's 1.5-hour estimate was deemed too costly for low-traffic pages, prompting a traffic-based prioritization.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [**FAQ Rollout:** FAQs are live on 53 integration pages and underway for feature/capability pages, with internal links to docs being added to boost user engagement and citation potential.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
  - [**Performance:** November traffic is on pace to match October, with non-branded impressions rising. Strapi now leads WordPress in all Scrumge categories, including "content management for developers."](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [**New Initiative:** GrowthX will begin monitoring key subreddits (e.g., Next.js) to generate top-of-funnel content ideas, a workaround for the delayed "Kappa" content-gap tool.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

## Topics

### Content & SEO Initiatives

  - [**Comparison Page Table Fix:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**Problem:** The large comparison table appears at the top of some pages, pushing key text below the fold.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
      - [**Solution:** Move the table below the text.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
      - [**Decision:** Prioritize the top 5 non-"Strapi vs." pages before EOY.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
          - [**Rationale:** The agency's 1.5-hour estimate was too costly for low-traffic pages.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
          - [**Future:** Re-evaluate other pages in Q1 2025.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [**FAQ Rollout:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [**Integration Pages:** FAQs are live on 53 pages; more are queued.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=681.0)
      - [**Feature & Capability Pages:** FAQs are underway.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=712.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Adding links to docs/reference pages within FAQs to provide deeper context and boost citation potential.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [**"About Strapi" Page:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [The footer FAQ link is being replaced with an experimental "About Strapi" page.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [Content is being generated for review by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**Metadata Audit:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [**Request:** Audit metadata for all blog articles.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
      - [**Status:** GrowthX currently updates metadata only during content refreshes; a full audit is a new request.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1238.0)
  - [**"Kappa" Content Gap Tool:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [**Status:** On hold.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [**Reason:** Engineering's focus on the Q1 2025 Atlas launch deprioritizes custom requests.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)
      - [**Impact:** Delays automated topic identification from social listening.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1351.0)

### Performance Review

  - [**November Traffic:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [On pace to match October's performance.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [Non-branded impressions are rising.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [Conversion events remain stable.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
      - [Overall LLM traffic is increasing.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [**Scrumge (Competitive Analysis):**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
      - [Strapi now leads WordPress in all tracked categories, including "content management for developers" and "customizable admin interfaces."](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [**GrowthX Integration Pages:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Performance:** Traffic has plateaued.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**LLM Traffic:** Driven by branded queries (e.g., "how to integrate Strapi with X").](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=960.0)
      - [**Plan:** Refresh top pages (e.g., AWS, Angular) to signal maintenance and potentially boost sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=986.0)
      - [**Clarification:** The performance analysis will be re-run using a confirmed list of pages written solely by GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Vivek:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [Identify the top 5 non-"Strapi vs." comparison pages for the table-move fix.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [Send a list of subreddits to monitor for content ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
      - [Re-run the integration page performance analysis using the correct page list.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1138.0)
  - [**Victor:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
      - [Review the new "About Strapi" page content by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=736.0)
  - [**GrowthX Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
      - [Begin monitoring subreddits and provide a listening report in weekly syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/T2L6H6-XmQ-FdJTQvWA4Px7Jghh9N56n?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
